*** CASE DISMISSED *** REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-13-2014 - NO APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF SADIYYAH SOHAN, AND SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT GERTRUDE R CHAVEZ WAS PRESENT. MATTER WAS PASSED UNTIL 9:45 AM AND THE CASE WAS RECALLED, THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED FOR NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT MAY FILE AN APPROPRIATE MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FOR FEES AND COSTS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
